item.title: The Twisted Story of Miguel Cortés Miranda
item.description: A true crime overview examining the case connected to Miguel Cortés Miranda, including reported events, investigation details, and public reaction. The video focuses on the timeline and key developments surrounding the story. What detail do you find most surprising in this case?

The video focuses on the timeline and key developments surrounding the story. What detail do you find most surprising in this case?

item.title: A Missing-Person Case Story
item.description: A true crime video exploring the details of a missing-person case, including the timeline, investigation, and public discussion surrounding the disappearance. The focus remains on the known facts and reported developments. What keeps people invested in cases like these?

item.title: Bianca Lebron: The “Uncle” Story
item.description: A true crime discussion centered on the disappearance of Bianca Lebron and a person connected to the investigation who became a major point of attention. The video reviews the case timeline and reported details. What detail do you find most unusual in this case?
